'''thovahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:biamped|biamped]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-v-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:biamped|biamped]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thovahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thovahithi|thovahithi]] || [[word:thovahiji|thovahiji]] || [[word:thovahishi|thovahishi]] || [[word:thovahiki|thovahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thovahuthuthu|thovahuthuthu]] || [[word:thovahujuju|thovahujuju]] || [[word:thovahushushu|thovahushushu]] || [[word:thovahukuku|thovahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovahuthu|thovahuthu]] || [[word:thovahuju|thovahuju]] || [[word:thovahushu|thovahushu]] || [[word:thovahuku|thovahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovahufthuf|thovahufthuf]] || [[word:thovahufjuf|thovahufjuf]] || [[word:thovahufshuf|thovahufshuf]] || [[word:thovahufkuf|thovahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thovahethe|thovahethe]] || [[word:thovaheje|thovaheje]] || [[word:thovaheshe|thovaheshe]] || [[word:thovaheke|thovaheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thovahothotho|thovahothotho]] || [[word:thovahojojo|thovahojojo]] || [[word:thovahoshosho|thovahoshosho]] || [[word:thovahokoko|thovahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovahotho|thovahotho]] || [[word:thovahojo|thovahojo]] || [[word:thovahosho|thovahosho]] || [[word:thovahoko|thovahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovahofthof|thovahofthof]] || [[word:thovahofjof|thovahofjof]] || [[word:thovahofshof|thovahofshof]] || [[word:thovahofkof|thovahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thovahĂŻfthĂŻf|thovahĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thovahĂŻfjĂŻf|thovahĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thovahĂŻfshĂŻf|thovahĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thovahĂŻfkĂŻf|thovahĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thovahĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thovahĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thovahĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thovahĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thovahĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thovahĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thovahĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thovahĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovahĂŻfthĂŻf|thovahĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thovahĂŻfjĂŻf|thovahĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thovahĂŻfshĂŻf|thovahĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thovahĂŻfkĂŻf|thovahĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovahĂŻfthĂŻf|thovahĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thovahĂŻfjĂŻf|thovahĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thovahĂŻfshĂŻf|thovahĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thovahĂŻfkĂŻf|thovahĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thovahĂŠthĂŠ|thovahĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thovahĂŠjĂŠ|thovahĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thovahĂŠshĂŠ|thovahĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thovahĂŠkĂŠ|thovahĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thovahathatha|thovahathatha]] || [[word:thovahajaja|thovahajaja]] || [[word:thovahashasha|thovahashasha]] || [[word:thovahakaka|thovahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovahatha|thovahatha]] || [[word:thovahaja|thovahaja]] || [[word:thovahasha|thovahasha]] || [[word:thovahaka|thovahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovahafthaf|thovahafthaf]] || [[word:thovahafjaf|thovahafjaf]] || [[word:thovahafshaf|thovahafshaf]] || [[word:thovahafkaf|thovahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thovahasha|thovahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thovahshĂ«sha|thovahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thovahrosha|thovahrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thovahmusha|thovahmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thovahyasha|thovahyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothovahnkshĂ«sha|gothovahnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothovahnkrosha|gothovahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothovahnkmusha|gothovahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothovahnkyasha|gothovahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thovavahasha|thovavahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thovavahshĂ«sha|thovavahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thovavahrosha|thovavahrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thovavahmusha|thovavahmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thovavahyasha|thovavahyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothovavahnkshĂ«sha|gothovavahnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothovavahnkrosha|gothovavahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothovavahnkmusha|gothovavahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothovavahnkyasha|gothovavahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thevĂŠhasha|thevĂŠhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thevĂŠhshĂ«sha|thevĂŠhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thevĂŠhrosha|thevĂŠhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thevĂŠhmusha|thevĂŠhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thevĂŠhyasha|thevĂŠhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothevĂŠhnkshĂ«sha|gothevĂŠhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothevĂŠhnkrosha|gothevĂŠhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothevĂŠhnkmusha|gothevĂŠhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothevĂŠhnkyasha|gothevĂŠhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thovfahasha|thovfahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thovfahshĂ«sha|thovfahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thovfahrosha|thovfahrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thovfahmusha|thovfahmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thovfahyasha|thovfahyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothovfahnkshĂ«sha|gothovfahnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothovfahnkrosha|gothovfahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothovfahnkmusha|gothovfahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothovfahnkyasha|gothovfahnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
